meta.patientListDescription: Browse published training programs, review your enrollments, and continue with the next relevant step.
meta.catalogFallbackDescription: Review available training programs and timing availability.
meta.patientDetailDescription: Review your training enrollment, payment state, and join access when available.
meta.patientPayDescription: Complete payment for your training enrollment when payment is still required.
meta.patientPaymentReturnDescription: Review your training payment return state and wait for the backend to confirm the enrollment.
meta.adminDescription: Manage the training catalog, publish states, and timings within the current admin contract.
meta.adminDetailDescription: Review and update training details, timings, and publish/archive actions within the current admin contract.

home.title: Follow the internal training assigned to your care journey.
home.note: This area shows the training linked to your account, the next step, and the enrollments that need your attention.

total.label: Enrollments
total.note: Training items already connected to your account

active.label: Active now
active.note: Enrollments you can continue or join

next.label: Needs attention
next.note: Items that need your attention right now

nextStep.heading: Your next relevant action
nextStep.note: When something needs attention, it appears here first so you can continue without guessing.

enrollments.heading: My training
enrollments.note: These are the patient and family training items already connected to your account, plus the next action for each one.

nextActions.pendingPayment: Payment is still required for this enrollment.
nextActions.active: This enrollment is active. Open the details to review join access when it becomes ready.
nextActions.default: Open this enrollment to review its current state.

empty.heading: No training enrollments yet
empty.note: Your care team will add the right training here when it becomes available.

error.heading: Could not show training enrollments right now
error.note: We were not able to load your training enrollments.

detail.notScheduled: Timing time is not available yet
detail.joinNote: Join access appears here when your enrollment is active and the timing is ready to start.
detail.joinReady: Join access is available now. Open the external room when you are ready.
detail.joinError: Could not resolve join access right now.

stateNotes.PENDING_PAYMENT: Payment is still required before this enrollment becomes active.
stateNotes.ACTIVE: This enrollment is active. You can review join access when the timing reaches its live window.
stateNotes.NO_SHOW: This enrollment was marked as no-show.
stateNotes.CANCELLED: This enrollment is no longer active.
stateNotes.REFUNDED: This enrollment was refunded and is no longer available for runtime access.

paymentNotes.CREATED: A payment record exists for this enrollment.
paymentNotes.PENDING: Payment is still pending and the enrollment stays blocked until it succeeds.
paymentNotes.REQUIRES_ACTION: Payment still needs action before enrollment can activate.
paymentNotes.AUTHORIZED: Payment is authorized and waiting for the final captured state.
paymentNotes.CANCELLED: The current payment attempt was cancelled.
paymentNotes.REFUND_PENDING: A refund is still in progress for this enrollment.
paymentNotes.PARTIALLY_REFUNDED: Part of this payment was refunded.

joinBlocked.ENROLLMENT_NOT_ACTIVE: Join stays blocked until the enrollment becomes active.
joinBlocked.SCHEDULE_NOT_JOINABLE: This timing is not in a joinable state right now.
joinBlocked.SCHEDULE_TIME_UNAVAILABLE: The timing timing is not available yet.
joinBlocked.JOIN_WINDOW_NOT_OPEN: The join window is not open yet.
joinBlocked.JOIN_ACCESS_NOT_CONFIGURED: Join access has not been configured for this timing.
joinBlocked.UNKNOWN: Join access is not available right now.

error.heading: Training enrollment is not available right now

pay.heading: Complete training payment
pay.note: This payment stays inside the training enrollment flow. Once payment succeeds, the backend confirms the enrollment and returns you to this page.
pay.hostedCheckoutNote: Open the hosted checkout page in the same tab so you can return here after payment.

error.heading: Training payment is not available right now
error.note: Could not load this enrollment payment state.

notPayable.heading: This enrollment does not need payment right now
notPayable.note: The current enrollment state no longer requires a payment step.

noRuntime.heading: Payment runtime is not available right now
noRuntime.note: This enrollment does not currently expose a hosted checkout link or a payment form runtime.

verifying.heading: Confirming your payment
verifying.note: We are checking the backend now. This usually takes only a moment.

success.heading: Payment confirmed
success.note: Your enrollment is now active and confirmed by the backend.

failed.heading: Payment did not go through
failed.note: You can try the payment again from the enrollment pay page.

canceled.heading: Payment was canceled
canceled.note: You can continue payment whenever you are ready.

pending.heading: Payment still needs attention
pending.note: We could not confirm the payment yet. You can review the enrollment or try the payment again.

error.heading: Training payment return is not available right now
error.note: Could not load this enrollment payment return state.

admin.title: Manage the training catalog and timings from one place.
admin.note: See what is open now, what is closed, and what has ended, then create or update items when needed.

summary.title: Track live training, closed items, and ended items at a glance.
summary.note: The counts below follow the current filter scope so you can scan the catalog without opening every item.

cards.closedNote: Visible, but not open for enrollment

scopeItems.visibility: Review the current training list with status and visibility.
scopeItems.scheduleRead: Create and maintain timing windows with enrollment timing.
scopeItems.runtimeBoundary: Publish or archive training items when the contract allows it.

boundaryItems.noAuthoring: Deep curriculum authoring and lesson structures are not part of this baseline.
boundaryItems.noAnalytics: Training analytics and reporting are not part of this surface.
boundaryItems.noCertificates: Certificates, assessments, and advanced learner tooling stay outside scope.

admin.fallbackDescription: This screen focuses on real backend training items without overbuilding the admin scope.

filters.heading: Filters
filters.note: Use search and status filters to narrow the catalog.

create.heading: Create training item
create.note: Start with the minimum details. You can refine, publish, and timing from the detail screen.
create.label: Admin-only
create.helper: Use a lowercase, hyphenated slug only.

validation.slug: Slug must be lowercase and hyphenated only.

create.adminOnlyNote: Training management is available to admin roles only.

placeholders.title: Add a clear training title
placeholders.fullDescription: Operational overview for the training detail

detail.note: Review core details, timings, and the allowed publish/archive actions from the current contract.

details.note: Review the core program record and the current operational posture of this training item.

lifecycle.note: Track the program story and the live operational load at a glance.

totalSchedules.label: Cohorts
totalSchedules.note: All cohorts attached to this program.

joinedSeats.label: Joined so far
joinedSeats.note: The seats used across the current cohort set.

endedSchedules.label: Ended
endedSchedules.note: Cohorts that are completed, cancelled, or archived.

totalLectures.label: Lectures
totalLectures.note: All lectures attached to the current cohorts.

schedules.note: Review the training cohorts, lecture plan, and enrollment state at a glance.

error.heading: Cohorts are not available
error.note: Could not load cohort data for this training.

empty.heading: No cohorts yet
empty.note: Add a training cohort before publishing this training.

scheduleUpdate.title: Update cohort
scheduleUpdate.note: Adjust the cohort status and external room details.

scheduleEnrollments.title: Enrollments
scheduleEnrollments.note: See who has joined this cohort and review the current enrollment state.

empty.heading: No one has enrolled yet
empty.note: This timing is still waiting for its first enrollment.

error.heading: Could not load enrollments
error.note: Try again to see the current enrollment list.

actions.adminOnly: Actions are available to admin roles only.
actions.notAvailable: No actions are available for this status yet.

notAvailable.heading: No action is available right now
notAvailable.note: The current training status does not expose publish or archive controls in this admin baseline.

adminOnly.heading: This area is inspection only for your role
adminOnly.note: You can review training details here, but publish and archive controls remain limited to admin roles.

archiveConfirm.title: Archive this training item?
archiveConfirm.description: Archive only when this training item should stop staying active in the current training admin baseline.

publishBlocked.heading: Add a cohort before publishing
publishBlocked.note: This training needs at least one cohort before it can be published.

update.compactNote: Keep this closed until you need to edit.
update.collapsed: The edit form is hidden to keep the page cleaner.

validation.slug: Slug must be lowercase and hyphenated only.

placeholders.title: Update the training title
placeholders.fullDescription: Operational overview for the training detail

createSchedule.note: Start with the core cohort details, then open the extra settings only if you need them.
createSchedule.compactNote: Open this only when you need a new cohort.
createSchedule.compactHint: Open the form only when the windows and lecture plan are ready.

validation.required: Enrollment and session windows are required.
validation.enrollmentWindow: Enrollment open must be before enrollment close.
validation.sessionWindow: Start time must be before end time.
validation.closeBeforeStart: Enrollment must close before the session starts.

createSchedule.title: Create training cohort

sections.coreNote: Set the core details and timezone that will be used for this cohort.
sections.timelineNote: Keep enrollment open before the session starts.
sections.advancedNote: Optional fields for internal scheduling details and external meeting rooms.

createSchedule.durationNote: The session end is calculated automatically from the selected start time and duration.

boundaryItems.noAnalytics: Analytics and reporting are not included in this baseline.
boundaryItems.noCertificates: Certificates and learner outcomes are outside scope.
boundaryItems.noAdvancedLms: Advanced LMS authoring is not part of this baseline.

error.heading: Training detail is not available
error.note: Could not load the training detail right now.

notFound.heading: Training item not found
notFound.note: The requested training item could not be found.

paymentAttempts.title: Failed payment attempts
paymentAttempts.note: Review failed and incomplete training payment attempts so the team can follow up quickly.

summary.label: Attempts needing follow-up
summary.note: Includes failed, expired, cancelled, and action-required attempts.

empty.heading: No failed attempts yet
empty.note: There are no failed or incomplete payment attempts for this training.

error.heading: Could not load payment attempts
error.note: Try again to see the current payment attempt list.

scheduleLectures.title: Lectures
scheduleLectures.note: Review the lectures attached to this cohort and keep the delivery plan complete before publishing.

empty.heading: No lectures yet
empty.note: Add the full lecture plan for this cohort before publishing.

error.heading: Could not load lectures
error.note: Try again to see the current lecture list.

create.title: Create lecture
create.note: Add a new lecture to this cohort with order, timing, and meeting-room details.

validation.required: Start and end times are required.
validation.window: Start time must be before end time.

errors.slugAlreadyExists: A training with a similar title already exists. Choose a different title.
errors.archivedReadOnly: This training is archived and read-only.
errors.localeRequired: Locale is required to update translations.
errors.invalidPublishTransition: This training cannot be published from its current status.
errors.invalidArchiveTransition: This training cannot be archived from its current status.
errors.invalidScheduleTransition: Timing status transition is not allowed.
errors.enrollmentMustCloseBeforeStart: Enrollment must close before the session starts.
errors.cannotOpenPastSchedule: Enrollment cannot open for a past timing.
errors.externalJoinUrlRequired: External join URL is required when a provider is set.
errors.externalRoomProviderRequired: External room provider is required when a join URL is provided.
errors.capacityBelowCurrentEnrollments: Capacity cannot be below current enrollments.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while saving training changes.

empty.heading: No training items are visible right now
empty.note: The current admin training contract did not return any training items.

error.heading: Training visibility is not available right now
error.note: Could not load the current admin training snapshot.

errors.scheduleRequiredForPublish: A training timing is required before publishing this training.
errors.invalidPlannedDurationDays: Planned duration must be at least 1 day.
errors.invalidPlannedLectureCount: Planned lecture count must be at least 1.
errors.trainingPlanRequired: A training plan is required before this timing can be opened.
errors.trainingPlanRequiredForPublish: A training plan is required before publishing this training.
errors.trainingPlanIncompleteForPublish: All planned lectures must be added before publishing this training.

adminDescription: Manage the training catalog, publish states, and training times within the current contract.
adminDetailDescription: Review and update training details, training times, and publish/archive actions within the current contract.

detail.note: Review the program record and the current operational posture from one place.

curriculum.note: Track planned lectures against the lectures already created for each cohort.

actualLectures.label: Actual lectures
actualLectures.note: Lectures already created for the current cohorts.

plannedDays.label: Planned days
plannedDays.note: Planned operating span for the cohort.

analytics.note: Track conversion, attendance, and payment follow-up from one place.

error.heading: Analytics are not available
error.note: Could not load the training analytics right now.

paymentConversion.label: Payment conversion
paymentConversion.note: Enrollments that reached a paid state.

attendanceCompletion.label: Attendance completion
attendanceCompletion.note: Enrollments that reached an attendance outcome.

failedPayments.label: Failed payment attempts
failedPayments.note: Attempts that ended with a failure.
